message:
docs: Add heterogeneous inference benchmark to README

Document the custom inference engine that enables running
Qwen2.5-Coder-32B (34.8GB) on a 32GB Mac:

- Architecture diagram showing heap cache + SSD streaming
- Performance metrics: 143s/token, 0.007 tok/s
- Key innovations: zero-copy GPU, parallel prefetch, heap cache
- Build commands for running benchmarks

files.patch:
@@ -147,6 +147,56 @@ Or add to `~/.claude/settings.json`:
 
 ## Benchmarks
 
+### Heterogeneous Inference: 32B Model on 32GB Mac
+
+Zell includes a custom inference engine that runs **Qwen2.5-Coder-32B** (34.8GB Q8_0) on a 32GB Mac - something that would normally require a Mac Studio with 192GB RAM.
+
+**Architecture:**
+```
+┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│              HETEROGENEOUS INFERENCE ENGINE                          │
+├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
+│                                                                      │
+│  GGUF File (34.8GB mmap)                                            │
+│       │                                                              │
+│       ├─── Layers 0-23: HEAP CACHE (12GB)                           │
+│       │         └── GPU reads directly (~70ms/layer)                 │
+│       │                                                              │
+│       └─── Layers 24-63: STREAMING (SSD)                            │
+│                 ├── 4-thread parallel prefetch                       │
+│                 └── GPU dequant Q8→BF16 (~70ms/layer)                │
+│                                                                      │
+│  GPU Pipeline:                                                       │
+│    mmap/heap → zero-copy Metal buffer → Q8→BF16 dequant → compute   │
+│                                                                      │
+└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+```
+
+**Performance on Apple M2 Pro (32GB):**
+
+| Metric | Value |
+|--------|-------|
+| Model | Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct-Q8_0 (34.8GB) |
+| Total Time | ~143 seconds/token |
+| Speed | 0.007 tok/s |
+| Heap Cache | 24 layers (12GB) |
+| Streaming | 40 layers (SSD) |
+
+**Key Innovations:**
+- **Zero-copy GPU access** via Apple Silicon unified memory
+- **Heap-based resident cache** - OS respects heap over mmap cache
+- **Parallel prefetch** (4 threads) saturates SSD bandwidth (~700MB/s)
+- **GPU Q8→BF16 dequantization** at 100GB/s memory bandwidth
+
+**Run the benchmark:**
+```bash
+# Full benchmark (requires ~35GB GGUF model)
+zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast inference
+
+# GPU dequant benchmark only
+zig build test-gpu-dequant
+```
+
 ### System Prompt Caching Performance
 
 Tested on **Apple M2 Pro** with **Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct-Q4_K_M** (4.4GB):
